title: Number of Ways to Rearrange Sticks With K Sticks Visible
titleCn: 恰有 K 根木棍可以看到的排列数目

testcases.input: n = 3, k = 2 Output: 3 Explanation: [1,3,2], [2,3,1], and [2,1,3] are the only arrangements such that exactly 2 sticks are visible. The visible sticks are underlined.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: [1,3,2], [2,3,1], and [2,1,3] are the only arrangements such that exactly 2 sticks are visible. The visible sticks are underlined.

testcases.input: n = 5, k = 5 Output: 1 Explanation: [1,2,3,4,5] is the only arrangement such that all 5 sticks are visible. The visible sticks are underlined.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: [1,2,3,4,5] is the only arrangement such that all 5 sticks are visible. The visible sticks are underlined.

testcases.input: n = 20, k = 11 Output: 647427950 Explanation: There are 647427950 (mod 109 + 7) ways to rearrange the sticks such that exactly 11 sticks are visible.
testcases.expectedOutput: 647427950 Explanation: There are 647427950 (mod 109 + 7) ways to rearrange the sticks such that exactly 11 sticks are visible.
